title: Subscription
subtitle: Manage your plan and billing
footNote: For now subscriptions are paid only by bank transfer; card payment is coming soon. When you change plan, the change takes effect after the payment is confirmed. After the paid period ends the account automatically reverts to Free. 7-day free trial (once) on the Start and Business plans.
reverted: Your account was reverted to the Free plan. Subscribe to keep using all the features of your chosen plan.
revertedDated: Your account was reverted to the Free plan on {date}. Subscribe to keep using all the features of your chosen plan.
featureLockTitle: Available on the “{plan}” plan and higher
pdfNotFound: The document was not found for download.
pdfFailed: PDF generation failed. Opening the print dialog — choose “Save as PDF”.
